name: Hieroglyph Quest: Wild Egypt

configuration.word_draw: draw 2 word cards, keep 1, bottom the other
configuration.word_mulligan: once per player per game, free action: replace your active word (signs return to hand, old word to bottom, draw 2 keep 1); flip your player marker (a coin) when used
configuration.recycle: instead of playing signs, discard any 2 signs and draw 2
configuration.steal: complete opponent word in one continuous play only

english_glosses: Nedjet {The place where Seth scattered the bones of Osiris}
bush (used as a hiding place) [with various determinatives] {late egyptian}
( a product made from rancid milk fat)
voracious spirits (crocodiles as a demonic animals)
benben stone (the sacred stone of ON)
a children's illness (conveyed via mother's milk ?)
(a harmful substance used in the preparation of Kyphi incense)
